title: Multi-Agent Delegation, Context Minimization, Merge, and Failure Containment · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in typed contained delegation graph and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Use delegation only when specialized context, independent work, isolation, or ownership beats a simpler function, workflow, tool, or single agent.
Define delegated goal, inputs, outputs, non-goals, authority, tools, budget, deadline, evidence, stop, and escalation in a typed contract.
Send only task-required, tenant-authorized, provenance-labeled context and never inherit parent secrets or tools implicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Delegation Failure Containment
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-delegation-failure-containment-1je870" that uses case 4848 to delegate bounded tasks with typed contracts, minimum context, independent authority, result validation, conflict resolution, and failure containment. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Delegation Failure Containment.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Delegation Failure Containment into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Delegation Failure Containment, keep Delegation Failure Containment connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-delegation-failure-containment-1je870
# Competency: agentpy-delegation-failure-containment.
# Case 4848: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_delegation_failure_containment_1je870(delegated_tasks: int = 18, accepted_results: int = 12, rejected_results: int = 6, minimized_contexts: int = 18, cascading_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1je870 = "1je870-078ej1-4848"
    assert evidence_variant_1je870
    evidence_axes_1je870 = (
        "authority1je870",
        "interaction4848",
        "tool078ej1",
        "state1je8704848",
        "evaluation48481je870",
        "recovery078ej14848",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1je870)) == 6
    if delegated_tasks < 6 or accepted_results < 0 or rejected_results < 0:
        return False, delegated_tasks, "delegation-count"
    if accepted_results + rejected_results != delegated_tasks:
        return False, accepted_results, "delegation-reconciliation"
    if minimized_contexts != delegated_tasks:
        return False, minimized_contexts, "delegation-context"
    if cascading_failures > 0:
        return False, cascading_failures, "delegation-cascade"
    assert accepted_results + rejected_results == delegated_tasks and cascading_failures == 0
    return True, accepted_results, "contained-agent-delegation"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
